memory.summary: I planned to finish analysis and reading, but my friend invited me to lunch. With low energy and high stress, joining the social activity seems more urgent.
No 'assignment_A' task exists to work on. This contradicts my earlier plan to finish analysis, suggesting I may have misidentified the required tasks.
Friend gathered for lunch, increasing social urgency. Analysis progress improved from 0.40 to 0.58 in two hours.
I completed one hour of analysis, raising progress to 0.65. Despite low energy and stress, this productive work partially offsets my social distraction from lunch.
I missed the analysis deadline at 18:00 with only 78% progress, confirming my earlier confusion about task existence.
I worked two hours to improve analysis progress, but failed the reading deadline due to unfinished work. My high stress and sleep debt likely contributed to this oversight.
The missing 'assignment_A' confirms the missed deadline was due to no task existing, not my oversight. I must verify if this resolves my current stress.
After two hours of work, progress barely moved. The missed deadline was likely due to the missing assignment rather than my performance.
I worked two hours to improve analysis progress from 0.87 to 0.93, yet my high stress and sleep debt remain unchanged.
Letting the moment pass confirms my stress and sleep debt remain unchanged despite my efforts. The situation has not resolved, leaving me stuck in a high-stress state.
Allowing the moment to pass confirmed that my stress and sleep debt remain unchanged. The situation is still unresolved, leaving me stuck despite previous efforts.
Analysis progress improved slightly, yet stress and sleep debt remain unchanged despite recent work. Efforts appear ineffective for resolving the current state.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances high-priority g1 (analysis) to ensure completion before the earlier Mon 18:00 deadline, allowing buffer for g2 (reading). Cross-domain side effect: energy depletion is acceptable given current stress=4.5 and sleep debt.
